name: Invited to the Ball
rulesText: Reveal the top 2 cards of your deck. Put revealed character cards into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

name: Elsa's Ice Palace
fullName: Elsa's Ice Palace - Place of Solitude
subtitle: Place of Solitude
rulesText: ETERNAL WINTER When you play this location, choose an exerted character. While this location is in play, that character can't ready at the start of their turn.

name: Baymax
subtitle: Armored Companion
rulesText: THE TREATMENT IS WORKING When you play this character and whenever he quests, you may remove up to 2 damage from another chosen character of yours. Gain 1 lore for each 1 damage removed this way.
